message:
fix: UTF-8 boundary handling in truncate functions

Apply consistent UTF-8-safe truncation to:
- internal/cli/history.go truncate()
- internal/cli/send.go truncatePrompt()

Also add debug logging to chaos_test for troubleshooting.
